title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 22 - 2017: Green Screens, Back to Books

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog recapping his June 22nd day in Boulder: visiting his mom's house, a doctor appointment, working on a car ad, and experimenting with green screen video editing techniques. He also mentions getting back into reading, specifically Platner & Ashby's topographical dictionary of ancient Rome, and listening to Xenophon's Anabasis.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited to practice and improve; figures out workflow by layering green screens last to preserve sound
should record in the morning instead of late at night when tired
less productive there because it's comfortable and she cooks for him
